channel.title: Abouts on Terminal
channel.description: Recent content in Abouts on Terminal

item.title: About
item.description: My name is Glenn Lewis I’m a DevOps Engineer. I currently live in Austin, TX with my wife and dog. I am going to sue this site to track my 100 days of code and as a technical blog.
item.content:
My name is Glenn Lewis

I’m a DevOps Engineer.

I currently live in Austin, TX with my wife and dog.

I am going to sue this site to track my 100 days of code and as a technical blog.
